name: Political Intrigue Court
description: Preset Political Intrigue Court with default tone, themes, and 3-arc structure.

text_areas.logline: Courtly alliances hide a succession crisis ready to explode.
text_areas.setting: A royal capital where favors are currency and secrets are weapons.
text_areas.main_objective: Secure legitimacy and neutralize destabilizing factions.
text_areas.stakes: Civil war fractures the realm and invites foreign invasion.

arcs.name: Arc I — Inciting Pressure
arcs.objective: Establish allies and identify first leverage point.

arcs.name: Arc II — Escalation
arcs.summary: Opposition adapts and raises the cost.
arcs.objective: Disrupt enemy momentum and protect key assets.

arcs.name: Arc III — Final Turning Point
arcs.summary: The central conflict reaches decisive climax.
arcs.objective: Resolve the core threat and define long-term consequences.
